CREATE TABLE test_intervals (id Int32, event_time DateTime);
WITH toIntervalMinute(5) AS interval_5_minutes SELECT event_time + interval_5_minutes AS new_event_time FROM test_intervals;
WITH toIntervalMinute(-10) AS interval_neg_10_minutes SELECT event_time + interval_neg_10_minutes AS new_event_time FROM test_intervals;
WITH toIntervalMinute(60) AS interval_60_minutes SELECT event_time + interval_60_minutes AS new_event_time FROM test_intervals WHERE id = 1;
WITH toIntervalMinute('30') AS interval_30_minutes SELECT event_time + interval_30_minutes AS new_event_time FROM test_intervals WHERE id = 2;
WITH d AS (SELECT event_time FROM test_intervals), iv AS (SELECT toIntervalMinute(15) AS interval_15_minutes) SELECT d.event_time + iv.interval_15_minutes AS new_event_time FROM d, iv;
WITH t AS (SELECT event_time FROM test_intervals), n AS (SELECT toIntervalMinute(0) AS interval_zero) SELECT event_time + interval_zero AS new_event_time FROM t, n;
WITH t AS (SELECT event_time FROM test_intervals WHERE id = 1), iv AS (SELECT toIntervalMinute(45) AS interval_45_minutes) SELECT event_time + iv.interval_45_minutes AS new_event_time FROM t, iv;
CREATE TABLE interval_test AS SELECT event_time, toIntervalMinute(id) AS interval_based_on_id FROM test_intervals;
